finding_results.notes: Three distinct telepathic misfires added across the first-contact and gallery passages. (1) Line 118: Anya starts a biographical question ('So you've been in—') and aborts because it would let Damian triangulate childhood overlap; Damian notices the clumsy redirect at line 120. (2) Line 130: Anya begins reassuring him ('You don't have to—') in response to his unspoken self-criticism before he has expressed it aloud; he glances at the odd half-sentence at line 132. (3) Line 182: Anya tells him to skip to the 'real answer' before he has given any answer; Damian directly asks 'Not the what?' at line 184 and studies her at line 188. Each misfire uses a different slip type (topic avoidance, emotional leakage, anticipatory knowledge) and each produces a visible Damian response, satisfying the acceptance test.

Sylvia's exit line replaced entirely. The left-pot/right-pot coffee-biohazard construction is gone. New line at line 55 ('There is loose-leaf in the break room. I keep it behind the mugs — Henderson drinks anything that sits still.') preserves Sylvia's low-contraction professional diction, dry humor, and minor human kindness while using completely new material. Accompanying thought at line 57 matches Sylvia's clipped institutional register. Downstream reference at line 81 updated from coffee to tea for internal consistency.

summary: Both findings addressed with local dialogue edits. The pressure-too-clean finding received three graduated telepathic misfires — a biographical redirect, an emotional leakage, and an anticipatory-knowledge slip — each producing a visible Damian reaction that registers oddness without decoding it. The calibration-echo finding received a fully new Sylvia exit line that preserves her voice signature and the beat's dramatic function without reusing the style-bible example's structure. No structural, pacing, or continuity changes; heading contract and all tracked setups preserved.
